Qwen3.6-Plus is compatible with OpenClaw (formerly Moltbot / Clawdbot). Here's the demo of Personal Schedule Management. https://t.co/qjkpRrwa7E https://t.co/CnHL8CWWTY

tweets.text: The model can understand design drafts, screenshots, and web interfaces to generate complete, runnable code, truly achieving the goal of "seeing the screen and writing the code." https://t.co/PDn13wal4t

Introducing GLM-5V-Turbo: Vision Coding Model

- Native Multimodal Coding: Natively understands multimodal inputs including images, videos, design drafts, and document layouts.
- Balanced Visual and Programming Capabilities: Achieves leading performance across core benchmarks for multimodal coding, tool use, and GUI Agents.
- Deep Adaptation for Claude Code and Claw Scenarios: Works in deep synergy with Agents like Claude Code and OpenClaw.

Try it now: https://t.co/WCqWT0qCQb
API: https://t.co/xDy1O6ZPcz
Coding Plan trial applications: https://t.co/qCM6cri0KK

x.name: Deedy Das
x.bio: Partner @MenloVentures. Formerly founding team @glean, @google Search. @cornell CS. Investor @AnthropicAI, @GoodfireAI, @OpenRouter, @WisprFlow, @_inception_ai

tweets.text: some relevant thoughts with more links on gaussian splats and world models if you're curious https://t.co/ioUxAlaFuE

Here's the research that demonstrates this for the city of Seoul using Naver map data (the Google of Korea): https://t.co/k3VOGGwqmG

World models are more than just endless virtual environments, it's about capturing  *the actual world we live in*:
- imagine being able to archive your childhood home
- your favorite spots growing up
- being able to explore hard to access parts of the world with your older parents
- Playing GTA in real cities
- perfect forensics in crime scenes
and so many more cool things.

Blows my mind that we currently possess the technology for Google Maps to turn all the street view images of the entire world into a video game you can play!

In the future, we'll be able to say "yeah let's check out New York City 100 years ago!" https://t.co/A3aiMRsLlm
